title: FurDreams Cat Roller Ball Toy Interactive - Blue | 3 Tier Tower Fun Ball with 3 Colour Balls | 3 Level Teaser with Play Balls | Puzzle for Exercise and Stimulation
features: 🧮 3 LEVELS OF FUN TRACKS: At 7.5 inches high and 9.5 inches wide, this 3 level cat toy includes 1 colourful kitty ball on each tier, perfect for multiple cats to play and chase
😺 STIMULATING CAT TOY: The bright colours and teasing nature allows for hours of fun reducing boredom and anxiety. This cat spinner toy also stimulates the cat's hunting instinct
🧶 REMOVABLE CAT BALLS: Treat your kitten to unlimited play and keep them busy in the playpen. You can remove the rolling ball with ease to play indoors or outdoor

💪 HEAVY DUTY MATERIALS: This cat ball tower is made of high-quality ABS plastic material, making it scratch resistant, sturdy & durable. It has an anti-slip pad base so it stays in place while your cat plays with it

🔗 EASY SET UP: Our cat puzzle toys are easy to assemble to provide your pet with hours of play and exercise. You can simply dismantle it for hassle-free storage and cleaning. Available in Green, Blue, and Pink
description: Product Description Our adorable roller toy will excite your cat, with the colourful spinning balls piquing your kittens' desire to play! They are then attracted by the balls as they cannot grab them as they roll around the tracks, teasing them and keeping their interest for ages. With a ball on each level, this is perfect for multiple cats to play, each one pawing away at them to play together and chase this about for hours. This interactive roller toy will keep away boredom. The bright colours and teasing nature of this goads them into chasing the balls around, keeping them active and healthy to keep away the fat! Further to this, you can play together with your pet, getting involved on the fun as they chase this around! This even has an extremely cute design to help appeal to the animal even more! Constructed from excellent and durable ABS plastic, this will survive the day-to-day toils of your pet jumping into and scratching away at it. This is scratch-resistant so will be completely safe for your cat and the environment. Security is assured as the toy has non-skid pads at bottom and the balls are perfectly sized balls to not come loose during play.
